attributes.action: Require Keir Starmer in PMQs to actually answer the questions put to him
attributes.additional_details:
Other Prime Minsters in UK history have had to answer questions put to them in PMQs, Keir Starmer simply dodges them or throws accusations followed by insults to the opposition and other political parties.

It is clear that the Prime Minister uses these pre-scripted answers because when he comes off-script, stutters start to creep in as he has no answers. The people of the UK deserve complete transparency and straight truthful answers from our Prime Minister. What is Keir Starmer hiding from us?
attributes.background: Week after week in Prime Minister's Questions, Keir Starmer conveys pre-scripted, rehearsed answers that bear no relevance whatsoever to the questions actually put to him. We believe he should be required to truthfully answer these questions, the people of the UK deserve complete transparency.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
